summary: Admin Dashboard fully functional. All backend API tests passed (17/17). All frontend UI tests passed. Admin login, dashboard stats, user management, organization listing, blog CRUD, feature flags, and audit logs all working correctly.

issues: Owner column shows 'Unknown' for all organizations - this is because owner_id is not set during org creation, only membership is created

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials returns token (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with invalid email returns 401
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with invalid password returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns all metrics (total_users, total_organizations, mrr, etc)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats without auth returns 401/422
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns list of users without password
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns detailed user info with stats and organizations
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/status toggles disabled status
Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/impersonate returns impersonation token
Backend: GET /api/admin/organizations returns all orgs with property/unit counts
Backend: GET /api/admin/blog returns all blog posts
Backend: POST /api/admin/blog creates new blog post
Backend: PUT /api/admin/blog/{post_id} updates existing post
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/blog/{post_id} deletes post
Backend: GET /api/admin/feature-flags returns current flags
Backend: PUT /api/admin/feature-flags updates flags
Backend: GET /api/admin/audit-logs returns platform audit logs
Frontend: Admin login page loads correctly
Frontend: Admin login with valid credentials navigates to dashboard
Frontend: Overview tab shows Total Users, Organizations, MRR, Properties stats cards
Frontend: Overview tab shows Subscription Breakdown and Recent Activity
Frontend: Users tab shows user table with Name, Email, Plan, Status, Joined, Actions columns
Frontend: Users tab search input filters users
Frontend: User view (eye icon) opens User Details dialog with stats and organizations
Frontend: User Details dialog shows Impersonate, Disable/Enable, Delete buttons
Frontend: Organizations tab shows all organizations with Name, Owner, Properties, Units, Plan, Created
Frontend: Billing tab shows MRR, ARR, Paying Customers and Revenue Breakdown
Frontend: Blog tab shows blog posts with View, Edit, Delete actions
Frontend: Blog New Post button opens Create Blog Post dialog
Frontend: Blog Edit button opens Edit Blog Post dialog with populated fields
Frontend: Blog dialog has title, category, status, excerpt, content, meta description fields
Frontend: AI Generate button visible on Blog tab
Frontend: Audit Logs tab shows platform-wide activity with timestamps
Frontend: Settings tab shows feature flag toggles
Frontend: Refresh button works on all tabs
Frontend: Logout button visible
action_items: Minor: Fix Organizations tab 'Owner' column showing 'Unknown' - consider storing owner_id in organization or fetching owner from first admin membership

seed_data_used.blog_posts: 3 existing blog posts found for edit testing
seed_data_used.users: 62 users available for user management testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard fully tested and working. All endpoints use Bearer token from /api/admin/login. Admin credentials: admin@mypropops.com / MyPropOps@Admin2026!. The test file /app/backend/tests/test_admin_dashboard.py contains comprehensive backend API tests.
